title: Summer Breeze Refreshment

diffuser.notes: Adjust to your taste; enjoy the invigorating aroma!

spray_optional.note: Shake well before use; spray on linens or surfaces.

why_it_works: Uplifting citrus and eucalyptus oils evoke a refreshing summer breeze, invigorating your senses and promoting a sense of renewal.
safety: Avoid eyes/mucosa; keep from children & pets.
Consult a professional if pregnant, nursing, or under care.
